steps.title: Match each coordinate to context
steps.content: The $x$-axis represents time in seconds after launch, and the $y$-axis represents height above ground in meters. So a point on the graph is written as $(\text{time},\text{height})$.

steps.title: Interpret the marked point
steps.content: The marked point is $(1.0,4.8)$, so the time is $1.0$ second and the height is $4.8$ meters. The answer is A.
